_comment: Gems vendored into the single shippable `relaton` gem by `rake build:combined`. Order is load order: `relaton` (the base: Db, registry, cache) first, then infrastructure, then flavor plugins. Per-gem source folders under gems/ are kept; this list only controls what the build vendors into one gem. POC subset — extend to all flavors (except relaton-cli) for the full rollout.
